solutions.solution: According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows [diagram shows Bail O, Sahid Afridi, Sachin with directional compass N-E-S-W]. So, from the above diagram, it is clear that Shahid Afridi came from East.

According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows [shows original directions and new directions diagrams with compass points]. Now, from the above diagrams, it is clear that the direction for South is South-East.

According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows [diagram shows path with distances: C-15km-B, 10km down to D, Final position E, 15km, 25km, with House (Starting point) and compass]. Clearly, Deepak is in North direction from his house
According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows [triangle diagram with points D, A, C, B and compass]. Clearly, the point B is located in the South-East direction from point A.

According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows [diagram showing 120km, 30km, 60km distances with Starting point and compass]. Clearly, station is in South-West direction from the train's starting point

Let A be the initial position of the man. He initially faced East and then turned his left in the direction of North and walked 10 yards. [diagram shows path with 50°, 45°, 10y measurements and points D, C, B, A]. Then, turned his left in the direction of West and walked 10 yards. Now, he turned 45° to his right and walked 50 yards straight in the same direction. Now, the direction of the man with respect to his starting point is North-West.
According to the question, the direction diagram can be drawn as [circular diagram showing 180°, 270°, 45° angles with compass points N, E, S, W]. Finally, man is facing the South-West direction.
Let Rita started from the point A [diagram shows path through points E, D, C, A, B with compass]. Passing through the points B, C and D, she is now going towards E. Clearly, she is now facing North.
Path of Raj is as follows [square diagram with diagonal paths and compass showing N, E, S, SW, W]. It is clear from the above figure that now Raj is in South-West direction.

According to the question, we have the following direction diagram [shows Roshan and Sumit with compass points N, E, S, W]. Here, it is not clear that the partners Roshan and Vaibhav sit opposite to each other or next to each other.
